authority: Maria Smith declares the publication conclusion; this receipt records post-seal empirical measurements.

protocol.blind_boundary: Each prediction was generated from its registered amino-acid sequence under the SFT selector and sealed before target access.
protocol.window_rule: After seal verification, compare every same-index contiguous three-residue window and report the minimum Kabsch C-alpha RMSD window.
protocol.feedback_prohibition: No target coordinate or post-seal local measurement was available to or fed back into the selector.
protocol.tm_scorer: calculate_tm.py compute_tm on the named local window
protocol.drmsd: root mean square difference between the two local C-alpha distance matrices

publication_status: Blind local sequence-to-structure empirical evidence declared for publication by Maria Smith; complete 76-residue blind prediction remains active forward work.
